name: Kaoruko Waguri Bot (Advanced)
author: borutovk7
description: Egg avançada com configuração dinâmica via variáveis de ambiente.
startup: if [ -d .git ]; then git fetch --all && git reset --hard origin/main; fi; npm install && node ./node_modules/@irithell-js/canvas-termux/dist/install.cjs && python3 -c "import json; c=json.load(open('configs/configs.json')); c['NomeDoBot']='{{BOT_NAME}}'; c['ownerName']='{{OWNER_NAME}}'; c['prefix']='{{BOT_PREFIX}}'; json.dump(c, open('configs/configs.json','w'), indent=2); n=json.load(open('configs/nescessario.json')); n['numero_dono1']='{{OWNER_NUMBER}}'; json.dump(n, open('configs/nescessario.json','w'), indent=2); a=json.load(open('configs/apikeys.json')); a['apis']['API_KEY_WAGURI']='{{API_KEY}}'; json.dump(a, open('configs/apikeys.json','w'), indent=2)" && node index.js

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
apt update
apt install -y git curl python3 make g++
cd /home/container
git clone https://github.com/borutovk7/Kauroko-bot.git .
npm install
node ./node_modules/@irithell-js/canvas-termux/dist/install.cjs
